prompt: One of the bundled dataset loaders pulls a large text-categorization collection down from a remote mirror on first use and caches it locally. Where is that download-and-cache entry point, and where are the remote file names and checksums it relies on declared?

rubric.answer_shape: one loader function, one metadata declaration

evidence.claim: downloads and caches the remote collection
declares remote file names and checksums

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
